<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"code":{"description":"8-character alphanumeric code sent via email.","type":"string"},"email":{"type":"string"}},"required":["email","code"],"type":"object"}}},"required":true}}

  id={undefined}
